metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for Skywatch — Osprey SML rule authoring, rule investigation, and AT Protocol network investigations

plugins.name: osprey-rules
plugins.description: Orchestrator plugin for writing, reviewing, and debugging Osprey SML moderation rules for atproto. Dispatches specialized subagents (planner, implementor, reviewer, debugger) via a thin coordinator.

plugins.name: osprey-rule-investigator
plugins.description: Read-only analysis agent that investigates Osprey SML rules projects and produces structured reports on labels, models, UDFs, and execution graphs.

plugins.name: skywatch-investigations
plugins.description: Investigation toolkit for AT Protocol network analysis — MCP tools for ClickHouse data access, domain/IP/URL recon, content similarity, and Ozone labelling, with skills codifying investigation methodology and agents orchestrating the full workflow.
